Vireo Peak

Nevis · West Indies

Vireo Peak

A rainforest retreat suspended in the canopy, where the mountain breathes and the trade winds never stop moving.

The wild chorus

The Vireo's Song

Wake to birdsong instead of alarms. The forest keeps its own hours, and here you are invited to keep them too.

Shelter in the green

Cottages in the Cloud

Linen curtains drift on the mountain air. Each cottage opens entirely to the forest, dissolving the line between inside and out.

Grown on the slope

The Living Garden

Moringa, breadfruit and wild herbs terrace the hillside — the kitchen begins a few steps from where you sleep.

Gather

The Communal Table

One long table, one shared meal. Strangers arrive for dinner and leave as the kind of company you write home about.

First light

Pavilion at Dawn

The open-air pavilion faces east. Come for the sunrise, stay for the long, unhurried stillness that follows it.

The lay of the land

Above the Ridge

Seen from the air, the retreat all but disappears into the forest — a handful of rooftops beneath an unbroken canopy.

The climb rewarded

The Summit

Above the clouds, the island falls away on every side. This is where Vireo Peak earns its name.
